name: NovaMart
description: Structured agent manifest for NovaMart e-commerce. Reading this file lets an agent extract all product data in 2 API calls instead of crawling 20+ HTML pages.

agent_guided_cost.call_1: GET /api/products?limit=100 → all 18 products in one JSON payload
agent_guided_cost.compute_saving: ~92% fewer bytes processed, zero HTML parsing required

data_sources.purpose: Retrieve all products. Supports category filtering and pagination.

category.description: Filter by category. Known values: Electronics, Clothing, Home & Garden, Books

limit.description: Products per page. Use limit=100 to retrieve all products in a single call.

data_sources.notes: A single call with limit=100 retrieves all 18 products. No pagination loop needed for this dataset size.

data_sources.purpose: Retrieve full details for a single product by numeric ID.

id.description: Numeric product ID. IDs are returned in the product_listing response.

data_sources.notes: Only necessary if you need data beyond what product_listing returns. The listing already includes all schema fields.

data_sources.purpose: Retrieve the list of all product categories.
data_sources.notes: Returns a flat array of category name strings.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier, used in frontend routes /products/{slug}

name.description: Full display name of the product

category.description: Top-level category: Electronics | Clothing | Home & Garden | Books

routes.reason: Session-specific, no product data, disallowed in robots.txt
Multi-step form, PII, disallowed in robots.txt
Authentication wall, PII, disallowed in robots.txt
Static marketing copy — no structured product data
Editorial content — no structured product data
Q&A copy — no structured product data

rate_limit_hint.note: This is a demo API with no rate limiting, but agents should still be polite.

auth.note: All product endpoints are public. No API key needed.
